blended.narrative: Vail is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,165 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 23".
